description: Implement a layered 2D tile rendering pipeline on the Canvas context. The renderer draws floor tiles, wall/structure tiles, objects, entities, and effects as separate layers in order, allowing dynamic composition of room visuals.
acceptance_criteria: The renderer draws tiles in defined layer order: floors (0), walls (1), objects (2), entities (3), effects/particles (4), lighting overlay (5), UI (6).
Each layer can be independently toggled on/off for debugging purposes.
Tiles are drawn from a spritesheet/tileset image using source rectangle coordinates.
Only tiles within the camera viewport are drawn (off-screen culling) to maintain performance.
The renderer supports drawing at least 25x17 tiles per frame at 60fps without jank.
A placeholder colored-rectangle fallback renders when sprite assets are not yet available.
notes: Layer spec from Appendix A.2.3. Canvas 2D context drawImage() with spritesheet clipping. Consider offscreen canvas per layer for compositing.
